entry.title: 英语每日练1——BlackPink演唱会Jennie中途退场
entry.content:
原文

Girl group BlackPink’s Jennie is being slammed online after she was spotted dining at hotpot chain Haidilao in Melbourne on June 11. That was the night Jennie bailed on their sold-out Melbourne arena concert, just five songs into the show. Her mid-song departure left the remaining members of the quartet , Lisa, Jisoo and Rose to perform the rest of the two-hour concert as a trio.

知识点

  1. slam : 愿意指把门猛地关上，因此也可以表达猛烈抨击某个人
  2. bail out: 愿意指跳伞，这里指的中途离开
  3. five songs into the show: 演唱会唱到第五首歌的时候. (30 minutes into the show )
  4. quertet 四 (trio, duo, solo )

entry.title: 英语每日练2——泰坦号
entry.content:
This morning, an ROV, or Remote Opereted Vehicle from the vessel Horizon Arctic, discovered the tail cone of the Titan submersible , approximately 1600 feet from the bow of the Titanic on the seafloor. The ROV subsequently found additional debris.

知识点

  • vessel: 船，血管
  • submersible: 潜水器
  • tail cone：尾椎
  • bow： 鞠躬，点头，船首
  • subsequently：随后
  • debries: 残骸

In consultation with experts from within the unified command, the debris is consistent with the catastrophic loss of the pressure chamber. Upon this determination, we immediately notified the families. On behalf of the United States Coast Guard, and the entire unified command, I offer my deepest condolences to the families.

知识点

  • consultation: 商讨
  • unified command：联合指挥所
  • be consistent with: 与……一致
  • notify: 通知
  • condolence: 吊唁，哀悼，慰问
  • upon the determination: 经过确认后
  • chamber: 房间，室，腔，舱

I can only imagine, what this has been like for them. And I hope that discovery provides some solace during the difficult time. Additionally, we’ve been in close contact with the British and French consul general, to ensure that they are fully apprized, and that their concerns are being addressed. the outpouring of support in this highly complex search operation has been robust and immensely appreciated.

知识点

  • solace: 安慰，慰藉
  • consul general： 总领事
  • apprize： 通知
  • outpouring： （强烈感情的）倾吐，流露；涌现，喷涌
  • robust： 强健的，强壮的，强烈的
  • immensely： 非常

We are grateful for the rapid mobilization of experts on the undersea search and rescue, and we thank all of the agencies and personnel for this full spectrum of international assistance that’s been provided. The ROVs will remain on scene and continue to gather information. Again, our most heartfelt condolences go out to the loved ones of the crew.

知识点

  • mobilization：动员
  • personnel： 全体人员
  • spectrum： 范围
  • crew：全体船员

entry.title: 周杰伦歌曲推荐
entry.content:
周杰伦音乐推荐

排名不分先后。

  • 搁浅
  • 我不配
  • 退后
  • 借口
  • 最长的电影
  • 花海
  • 你听得到
  • 心雨
  • 白色风车
  • 一路向北
  • 明明就
  • 说好的幸福呢
  • 我落泪情绪零碎
  • 珊瑚海
  • 蒲公英的约定
  • 回到过去
  • 黑色毛衣
  • 红尘客栈
  • 浪漫手机
  • 断了的弦
  • 枫

entry.title: 找到最长的半重复子字符串
entry.content:
找到最长的半重复子字符串

题目描述

给你一个下标从 0 开始的字符串 s ，这个字符串只包含 0 到 9 的数字字符。

如果一个字符串 t 中至多有一对相邻字符是相等的，那么称这个字符串 t 是 半重复的 。例如，0010 、002020 、0123 、2002 和 54944 是半重复字符串，而 00101022 和 1101234883 不是。

请你返回 s 中最长 半重复 子字符串的长度。一个 子字符串 是一个字符串中一段连续 非空 的字符。

分析

题目要求一个字符串中最长的半重复子字符串的长度，很自然的想法是考虑双指针。

我们的右指针不断向前走，并且不断判断当前子字符串是否是半重复的，这里可以去维护当前子字符串中相邻并相同字符对的个数

只要这样的字符对个数为2时，说明当前子字符串不合法，我们便去移动左指针，移动多少呢？

我们不断移动左指针，使得当前左指针所指位置和其后一个位置的元素相同即可，这样我们可以将该子字符串中的一个相邻并相同字符对去掉。

代码
